recommended_engineering_model_for_v2.name: snapshot_c24_v2_eerg_off_pruned_equivalent
recommended_engineering_model_for_v2.reason: Pure EERG-off is a performance-equivalent pruning candidate: it keeps held-out test predictions identical to full-feature C24 while disabling one non-contributing internal feature group. It is not an accuracy-improvement claim.

rtl_mapping.eerg_off: hard-zero or remove the EERG gate/applied class-membrane contribution
rtl_mapping.behavior_note: The opened held-out test dump shows 0 pred_class changes versus full-feature C24.

accuracy_improvement_candidate_not_accep.name: snapshot_c24_v2_eerg_off_chf_guard
accuracy_improvement_candidate_not_accep.reason: This candidate improved validation by one window but reduced held-out test accuracy from 205/256 to 203/256, so it is rejected as an accuracy-improvement model.

rtl_mapping.chf_guard: integer comparator conjunction using pnn_x10, ram_x100, rdm_x100, dscr_slope, dscr_flip
rtl_mapping.chf_boost: fixed signed add of 8000000 to CHF class membrane when guard fires
